title: Regolamenti dwar Retirement Pensions (Defined Benefit Retirement Schemes)
title_en: Regolamenti dwar Retirement Pensions (Defined Benefit Retirement Schemes)
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/514.4/mlt, expression eli/sl/514.4/20150115/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
RETIREMENT PENSIONS
(DEFINED BENEFIT RETIREMENT SCHEMES)

[ L.S.514.04

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 514.04
REGOLAMENTI DWAR RETIREMENT PENSIONS
(DEFINED BENEFIT RETIREMENT SCHEMES)*
1 ta’ Jannar, 2015 *
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 8 tal-2015, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 45 tal-2020.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*ara r-regolament regulation 1(2) ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti, kif promulgati
oriġinarjament.

1
